description: A quote card graphic. The top two-thirds is a color photograph of Kristi Noem standing in front of concrete signage; behind her a wall reads 'CECOT' in large gray letters and 'CENTRO DE CONFINAMIENTO DEL TERRORISMO' beneath. Noem wears a navy ball cap with a gold DHS badge and a white long-sleeve top, and looks off to the side. A red horizontal divider separates the photo from a navy-blue lower panel containing a white bold-serif quote: '“President Trump and I have a clear message to criminal illegal aliens: LEAVE NOW. If you do not leave, we will hunt you down, arrest you, and you could end up in this El Salvadoran prison.”' Below a short white rule it is attributed to 'Secretary Kristi Noem / U.S. Department of Homeland Security,' with the white DHS seal in the lower-left.
notable_text: CECOT — CENTRO DE CONFINAMIENTO DEL TERRORISMO; “President Trump and I have a clear message to criminal illegal aliens: LEAVE NOW. If you do not leave, we will hunt you down, arrest you, and you could end up in this El Salvadoran prison.”; Secretary Kristi Noem, U.S. Department of Homeland Security
